key_events: KOSPI surged 8.44% to close at 5,478.70 on April 1, 2026, marking a historic rebound.
Market optimism driven by de-escalation hopes in the Iran-US conflict, snapping a four-day losing streak.
Buy-side circuit breaker triggered due to extreme market volatility and gains; Samsung Electronics surged 13.4%.

art.market_outlook: Vibrant and busy, with major events starting in April.

upcoming_events.description: BEXCO Exhibition Center 1, Busan. Features 136 galleries.
COEX Hall C&D, Seoul. Longest-running art fair in Korea.

upcoming_events.event: APMA, Chapter Five – From the APMA Collection
upcoming_events.description: Amorepacific Museum of Art featuring David Hockney, Rose Wylie, Nam June Paik, and Lee Ufan.

art.policy: April is 'Science Month' in South Korea.
